verdict_reasoning: LRRK2 is a large cytoplasmic serine/threonine kinase with a mitochondrial outer membrane association. It lacks a transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or any documented plasma membrane pool. Its localization is explicitly cytoplasmic and organellar (mitochondrial), and its function is intracellular kinase signaling and autophagy regulation. No surface-directed therapeutic targeting or stable plasma membrane anchoring is established.
